The Ark Enters the Temple


(2 Chronicles 5:1–14)

NoteThat is, the Feast of Tabernacles (or Booths or Shelters); similarly in verse 65; see Leviticus 23:33–36. NoteEthanim was the seventh month of the ancient Hebrew lunar calendar, usually occurring within the months of September and October.
NoteOr the Holy of Holies
NoteLiterally not from outside
NoteThat is, Mount Sinai, or possibly a mountain in the range containing Mount Sinai

(2 Chronicles 6:1–11)

NoteSome LXX manuscripts The Lord has set the sun in the heavens, but
